headline: Audio Engineering
description: Audio engineering encompasses recording, mixing, and mastering sound. Key concepts: frequency (pitch, Hz), amplitude (loudness, dB), waveform (timbre). Recording chain: source → microphone → preamp → ADC → DAW. Mixing: balance levels, pan (stereo placement), EQ (adjust frequency balance), compression (control dynamics), reverb/delay (space).

citation.name: Mastering Audio: The Art and the Science (4th Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Katz B.
